description_long: This is a robust outdoor bench featuring a seat and backrest made from dark reddish-brown wooden planks, supported by two thick, rectangular stone or concrete legs at either end. The wood planks are arranged horizontally, with two forming the backrest and three forming the seat, each separated by narrow gaps. The supporting legs are substantial, with a speckled, aggregate stone appearance, providing both stability and a decorative contrast to the wood. The bench has a clean, modern design with no armrests, making it accessible from either side. The materials and construction suggest durability and resistance to weather, suitable for parks, sidewalks, or public plazas. The overall form is simple yet functional, prioritizing comfort and longevity in high-traffic urban environments.
description: A sturdy outdoor bench with dark reddish-brown wooden planks and thick stone or concrete legs, featuring a backrest and no armrests. Its modern, durable design is ideal for public spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the bench, the wooden seat and backrest, and both stone legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the wooden planks and the depth of the stone leg, with the backrest visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the wooden backrest and the full width of the stone legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the profile of the seat and backrest with the stone leg.
